---
title: "encodeapiutil"
author: "Zoheb Khan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{1. encodeapiutil}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE, comment="#>")
```

# Introduction

`encodeapiutil` is being developed as a small R interface for querying ENCODE
Portal metadata, reviewing available experiments and files, and deliberately
retrieving selected datasets.

This vignette is a placeholder for the package setup phase. The first evaluated
examples will be added after the core ENCODE query functions are implemented.

# Installation

```{r install, eval=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly=TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("encodeapiutil")
```

# Session Information

```{r session-info}
utils::sessionInfo()
```
